name: Honey & Whole Wheat Waffles
recipeIngredient: 3 large eggs, separated, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the waffle iron.
2. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat and set aside to cool.
3. In a medium bowl, combine both flours, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. In another bowl, mix milk and honey.
5. Beat the liquid mixture into the melted butter until combined.
6. Beat egg yolks into the butter mixture.
7. Stir in the flour mixture just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
8. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Gently fold egg whites into the batter until blended.
10. Pour sufficient batter onto the waffle iron to cover 2/3 of the grid.
11. Spread batter to the edges using a spatula.
12. Close the lid and cook until steaming stops, about 5 minutes.
13. Use a fork to remove the finished waffle from the grid.
14. Repeat with remaining batter.
